label: Tobaksvarutillverkning
description: Scaffold för tobaksvarutillverkning med fokus på företagsprofil, produktionskapacitet, produktsortiment, regelefterlevnad och affärskontakt.
primaryJobs: bygga förtroende genom tydlig företagsinformation och regelefterlevnad
ge inköpare, återförsäljare eller samarbetspartners en enkel väg till kontakt

routes.purpose: Positionera tillverkaren, förklara verksamhetens inriktning och leda vidare till kontakt.
Presentera produktkategorier, sortiment eller tillverkningsinriktning på ett tydligt sätt för företagskunder och samarbetspartners.
Beskriva tillverkning, kvalitetssäkring och kapacitet på en konkret och förtroendeskapande nivå.
Bygga förtroende genom företagspresentation, historia, organisation och team.
Ge tydliga kontaktvägar för affärsförfrågningar, partnerskap och allmän kontakt.

routes.when: when the business has recurring questions about sortiment, bestallningar, leveranser eller kontaktvagar
when a physical office, fabrik eller besoksadress should be shown separately with karta och oppettider

sectionOrderRules: Hero must state the company's business type and primary CTA.
Business summary must explain what the company manufactures in concrete terms without vague marketing claims.
Product-category-summary should appear before the final CTA.
Trust proof must rely on real company facts such as organisation details, established processes or visible contact information.
Sections should avoid repeating the same claim in multiple blocks.
Products intro must describe the sortiment or manufacturing focus clearly and factually.
Product-category-list items must be specific categories or offerings, not generic placeholders.
If pricing-overview is shown, it should present honest indicative information only when such data exists.
Inquiry CTA should follow the main product listing.
Production intro must explain the manufacturing operation in plain language.
Process overview should describe steps, capabilities or workflows without disclosing unsupported technical claims.
Quality-and-compliance must stay factual and mention only real standards, controls or internal routines if provided.
Contact CTA must invite business inquiries after the operational information.
About story must be specific to the company and avoid generic brand language.
Team should only render when actual people or roles are available.
Company facts should include concrete business information such as organisation details or location when supplied.
Contact info must contain real available contact methods and no placeholders.
Contact form should be positioned after or beside the primary contact details.
Map and opening hours should only render when verified address and schedule data exist.

mustPass: Has home route '/' and a contact route.
Route set reflects tobaksvarutillverkning by including product and production-focused pages.
Every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
All paths are Swedish, lowercase and without trailing slash.
All wording stays factual and avoids invented certifications, counts or compliance claims.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: generic service-business structure without product or production pages
consumer e-commerce assumptions such as cart or checkout
health claims, promotional claims or unsupported regulatory statements
placeholder trust signals that are not backed by provided company data

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Branschspecifik scaffold for tobaksvarutillverkning. Webbplatsen bor prioritera startsida, produktsida, produktionssida och kontakt. Innehall ska bygga fortroende genom konkret foretagsinformation, produktkategorier, tillverkningsprocess, kvalitet och tydliga affarskontaktvagar snarare an generell tjanstekopia.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold when the business is a manufacturer of tobacco products or related tobacco manufacturing operation.
Prefer product-category and production-oriented information architecture over service-list architecture.
Tone should be rak och fortroendeingivande with emphasis on company facts and business contact.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
